coups and
rebellions | list1 = {{Navbox|subgroup | group1 = Pre-Modern
Japan | list1 = * [[Kibi Clan Rebellion]] (463) * [[Prince Hoshikawa Rebellion]] (479) * [[Iwai Rebellion]] (527) * [[Isshi incident]] (645) * [[Jinshin War|Jinshin Rebellion]] (672) * [[Hayato Rebellion]] (720–721) * [[Fujiwara no Hirotsugu Rebellion]] (740) * [[Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion]] (764) * [[Tengyō no Ran]] (939–940) * [[Hōgen Rebellion]] (1156) * [[Heiji Rebellion]] (1160) * [[Shishigatani incident]] (1177) * [[Siege of Hōjūjidono]] (1184) * [[Kennin Rebellion]] (1201) * [[Jōkyū War|Jōkyū Rebellion]] (1221) * [[Shōchō uprising]] (1428) * [[Yūki War]](1440-1441) * [[Kakitsu uprising]] (1441) * [[Yamashiro ikki|Yamashiro Rebellion]] (1485–1493) * [[Kaga Rebellion]] (1487–1488) * [[Honnō-ji Incident]] (1582) * [[Kunohe Rebellion]] (1591) * [[Rokugō Rebellion]] (1603) * [[Shimabara Rebellion]] (1637–1638) * [[Keian Uprising]] (1651) * [[Shakushain's revolt]] (1669–1672) * [[Menashi–Kunashir rebellion]] (1789) * [[Ōshio Heihachirō#The rebellion|Ōshio Heihachirō's Rebellion]] (1837) * [[Teradaya incident]] (1862, 1866) * [[Shimonoseki Campaign]] (1863–1864) * [[Tenchūgumi incident]] (1863) * [[Mito Rebellion]] (1864) * [[Kinmon incident]] (1864) | group2 = [[Meiji era]] | list2 = * [[Two Lords Incident]] (1868) * [[Saga Rebellion]] (1874) * [[Shinpūren Rebellion]] (1876) * [[Akizuki Rebellion]] (1876) * [[Hagi Rebellion]] (1876) * [[Satsuma Rebellion]] (1877) * [[Takebashi incident|Takebashi incident]] (1878) * [[Fukushima incident (1882)|Fukushima incident]] (1882) * [[Chichibu incident]] (1884) | group3 = [[Shōwa era]] | list3 = * [[March incident]] (1931) * [[October incident]] (1931) * [[League of Blood Incident]] (1932) * [[May 15 incident]] (1932) * [[Military Academy incident]] (1934) * [[February 26 incident]] (1936) * [[Kyūjō incident]] (1945) * [[Matsue incident]] (1945) * [[Sanmu incident]] (1961) * [[Yukio Mishima#Coup attempt and ritual suicide|Mishima incident]] (1970) }} | group2 = Riots and
